name: AR Aging Agent
tagline: Accounts receivable analysis and overdue tracking
description: The AR Aging Agent connects directly to your Business Central instance to deliver real-time accounts receivable insights. It analyses overdue balances, identifies at-risk customers, computes aging buckets (current, 30, 60, 90+ days), and surfaces payment trend anomalies — all through natural language. No BI tool or manual export required. Ask it to flag your top 10 overdue accounts, compute DSO, or summarise cash flow risk by customer segment.

reviews.author: Finance Manager, Apex Foods
reviews.comment: Cut our monthly AR review from 3 hours to 15 minutes. Pinpoints overdue accounts instantly.

reviews.author: Controller, MidWest Dairy
reviews.comment: No more spreadsheet exports. The aging buckets are accurate and always fresh.

reviews.author: CFO, Harvest Group
reviews.comment: Great for daily aging snapshots. Would love more chart export options in future.
